Indicative Term Sheet — Secured Convertible Notes of Lanna Resin Public Company Limited (PCL), a fictional issuer listed on the SET; Investor: Mekhala Growth Fund I, L.P. (fictional).
Instrument and size: Senior secured, Thai baht–denominated convertible notes; aggregate principal to be determined within a publicized range consistent with the issuer’s prior SET announcement dated 1 April 2026.
Use of proceeds: General corporate purposes and refinance of existing indebtedness previously described in the issuer’s One Report; not a tender offer under Thai law.
Conditions precedent: Compliance with the Securities and Exchange Commission, Thailand (SEC Office) and SET disclosure rules, including submission of updated board resolutions, financial statements, and an information memorandum; the issuer shall confirm no undisclosed MNPI at signing and closing.
Covenants: PDPA-compliant processing of personal data, prohibition on sharing employee or customer data outside the stated purposes, and adherence to Notification of the Capital Market Supervisory Board on acquisition/disposal of assets and connected transactions.
Cross-border structure: Notes governed by English law, Thai law security over shares and receivables, and settlement through a Singapore paying agent using non-personal reference code SG-TEST-001 for reconciliation only.
Conversion mechanics: Conversion price linked to the 15-trading-day SET VWAP; anti-dilution customary; example ticker for illustration only: LRPF (not an actual security identifier); no stabilization mechanisms promised.
Disclosure: Public announcement via SET portal and SEC Office filing upon execution; this term sheet summarizes already-announced intentions and does not itself contain confidential or price-sensitive information.
Communications: Role mailboxes only (ir@lannaresin.example and compliance@mekhalafund.example); inquiries by the public may be made via the SET online help center.
Insider procedures: An insider list template may be circulated in draft form; do not populate with actual names or personal emails until board approval and only after PDPA notices are delivered.
Responsible officer (for KYC only): Finance Manager, born 1990-04, based in Bang Kapi district, device tag DR-7A, staff code LR-00319, internal wallet ref 88-XX-5123; no personal phone or private email will be collected in this term sheet.
Payments: Paying agent to provide settlement coordinates post-CP; placeholder account 000-000-000, IBAN XX00TEST000000000000, and SWIFT TESTXX00 are invalid and for drafting convenience only.
Sanctions and compliance: No dealings with restricted jurisdictions; only aggregated demographic statistics may be disclosed externally and not in a manner that identifies any individual.
Governing law and dispute resolution: Notes under English law, security and corporate authorizations under Thai law; disputes to Thai Arbitration Institute with seat in Bangkok unless parties agree otherwise.
Employee matters: No change-in-control severance terms are included; any ESOP adjustments will follow SET/SEC guidance and will be summarized in a public board report.
